processing.note: raw sheet carried an off-white band along the bottom that bridged neighbouring icons after the magenta key, so the sheet is cut into its 3 grid columns first and the largest alpha component is taken per column
steps: chroma key magenta via generate2dsprite.py remove_bg_magenta (threshold 100, edge 150)
white/pale-pink residue key: r>=195 && b>=190 && g>=165 -> alpha 0 (gold linework never keeps blue high)
per-column largest connected component (alpha>8), crop +6px pad, shared scale to fit 128*0.92, center paste
defringe pass 1: r>g+40 && b>g+40 -> clamp r<=g+45, b<=g+25
defringe pass 2 (bronze rule): b>g+8 && r>g+8 -> clamp b<=g-4
QC: 0 magenta-residual pixels (r>180 && b>180 && g<100) on all 3 cells

icon_semantics.subcity: ancient city wall gatehouse (right-edge float button)
icon_semantics.event: unfurled bamboo slip scroll (right-edge float button)
icon_semantics.account: person bust with shoulder robe (right-edge float button; action stays requestResetGame for now)

intended_use: world-map home right-edge floating round buttons (MapCommandCanvasRenderer.renderFloatingMapButton); replaces the painterly hud-icon-subcity/event/account.png set on these buttons only
